title: CPVP Royale QOL
description: QOL utilities for the server CPVP.gg (discord.gg/royale)
body:
# CPVP Royale QOL
A client-side Fabric utility mod designed for the server **CPVP.gg**, providing multiple QOL features to improve your experience.

# Features
- **Glowing Heads**: This will add a glow onto heads in your inventory.
- **Head Counter**: Shows the amount of heads in your inventory. (Customizable HUD Editor)
- **Big Totems**: Increases the size of totems (Not in your hand, on the ground/dropped items), making them big enough to catch attention. Totem Scale slider to increase their size from 1.0x to 5.0x.

# Disclaimer
I can not guarantee this mod will not ban on other servers, this is only officially allowed for the server CPVP.gg.
